---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new record type, field addition, or protocol extension
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What are you proposing? Be specific — "add a `disputeReference` field to `world.ptah.log`" is more useful than "improve attribution".

## Use Case

What real scenario does this enable or solve? Concrete examples from actual world-building, competitive play, or content publishing work are especially helpful.

## Proposed Shape

If you have a sense of what the schema should look like, sketch it here. Doesn't need to be valid JSON — just enough to communicate the idea.

```json
{
  "fieldName": "type and description"
}
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any other ways you've thought about solving this, and why they fall short.

## Roadmap Check

Have you checked the [Roadmap](../../ROADMAP.md)? This may already be planned.
